Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.core
  2. ZSetOperations
  3. TypedTuple

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.redis.core.ZSetOperations.TypedTuple

Packages that use ZSetOperations.TypedTuple
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.core
Core package for integrating Redis with Spring concepts.
org.springframework.data.redis.support.collections
Package providing implementations for most of the java.util collections on top of Redis.

    BoundZSetOperations.add(Set<@NonNull ZSetOperations.TypedTuple<V>> tuples)

    Add tuples to a sorted set at key, or update its score if it already exists.

    ReactiveZSetOperations.addAll(@NonNull K key, @NonNull Collection<? extends @NonNull ZSetOperations.TypedTuple<V>> tuples)

    BoundZSetOperations.addIfAbsent(Set<@NonNull ZSetOperations.TypedTuple<V>> tuples)
    Add tuples to a sorted set at the bound key if it does not already exists.
